snippet.title: Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) | Peddi | Ram Charan | Janhvi | Buchi Babu Sana | AR Rahman
snippet.description:
Presenting the energetic Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) from the film Peddi 🎶🔥

Starring global star Ram Charan and the stunning Janhvi Kapoor, this vibrant track brings electrifying visuals and captivating performances.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana and composed by the legendary A. R. Rahman, the song delivers a powerful blend of rhythm, melody, and celebration. 💃🕺

Turn up the volume and feel the festive Telugu vibes!

#RaiRaiRaaRaa #Peddi #RamCharan #JanhviKapoor #ARRahman #BuchiBabuSana #TeluguSongs #Tollywood #NewSong #DanceHit

snippet.title: Aadu 3 Official Trailer | Jayasurya | Midhun Manuel Thomas |Vijay Babu & Venu Kunnappilly| Vinayakan
snippet.description:
Aadu -3 , In Theatres Worldwide from 19th March 2026! 

Cast : Jayasurya, Vijay Babu, Sunny Wayne, Vinyakan, Saiju Kurup, Dharmajan, Harikrishnan, Bhagath Manuel, etc.

Written and Directed by:  Midhun Manuel Thomas
Produced by : Vijay Babu & Venu Kunnappilly

ru.title: 13 минут назад два американских грузовых корабля с 12 тысячами тонн топлива были уничтожены российск
ru.description:
13 минут назад два американских грузовых корабля с 12 тысячами тонн топлива были уничтожены российскими Як-141. 



#арма 3 
#милсим 
#геймплей 
#UkraineevsРоссия 
#Россия 
#Украина 
#НАТО 
#БайРактар 
#военныйсимулятор 
#элитоператор 
Это видео представляет собой симулятор виртуальной игры. 
Боевая симуляция может отличаться от реальной. 
Мы смоделировали статьи, которые появляются в новостях.

bn-IN.description:
13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান ইয়াক-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয়েছিল। 



#আরমা ৩ 
#মিলসিম 
#গেমপ্লে 
#ইউক্রেন রাশিয়া 
#রাশিয়া 
#ইউক্রেন 
#ন্যাটো 
#বেরক্তার 
#সামরিক সিমুলেটর 
# অভিজাত অপারেটর 
এই ভিডিওটি একটি ভার্চুয়াল গেম সিমুলেশন। 
যুদ্ধের সিমুলেশন প্রকৃত সিমুলেশন থেকে ভিন্ন হতে পারে। 
আমরা সংবাদে প্রদর্শিত নিবন্ধগুলি অনুকরণ করেছি। 
আরমা গেমপ্লে ভিডিও। 

"এই ভিডিওটি বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s এর সামগ্রী ব্যবহার করে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।" 

"কপিরাইট © 2013 বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s. সর্বস্বত্ব সংরক্ষিত।"

bn.title: 13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান ইয়াক-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয
bn.description:
13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান ইয়াক-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয়েছিল। 



#আরমা ৩ 
#মিলসিম 
#গেমপ্লে 
#ইউক্রেন রাশিয়া 
#রাশিয়া 
#ইউক্রেন 
#ন্যাটো 
#বেরক্তার 
#সামরিক সিমুলেটর 
# অভিজাত অপারেটর 
এই ভিডিওটি একটি ভার্চুয়াল গেম সিমুলেশন। 
যুদ্ধের সিমুলেশন প্রকৃত সিমুলেশন থেকে ভিন্ন হতে পারে। 
আমরা সংবাদে প্রদর্শিত নিবন্ধগুলি অনুকরণ করেছি। 
আরমা গেমপ্লে ভিডিও। 

"এই ভিডিওটি বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s এর সামগ্রী ব্যবহার করে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।" 

"কপিরাইট © 2013 বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s. সর্বস্বত্ব সংরক্ষিত।"

te.description:
13 నిమిషాల క్రితం, 12,000 టన్నుల ఇంధనాన్ని తీసుకువెళుతున్న 2 US కార్గో షిప్‌లను రష్యన్ యాక్-141లు ధ్వంసం చేశాయి.

#మిల్సిమ్

ఈ వీడియో వర్చువల్ గేమ్ సిమ్యులేషన్. 
పోరాట అనుకరణ వాస్తవ అనుకరణకు భిన్నంగా ఉండవచ్చు.

13 ਮਿੰਟ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ, 12,000 ਟਨ ਈਂਧਨ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਜਾ ਰਹੇ 2 ਅਮਰੀਕੀ ਕਾਰਗੋ ਜਹਾਜ਼ਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਰੂਸੀ ਯਾਕ-141 ਦੁਆਰਾ ਤਬਾਹ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਸੀ। 



#ਅਰਮਾ 3 
#ਮਿਲਸਿਮ 
#ਗੇਮਪਲੇ 
#UkraineevsRussia 
#ਰੂਸ 
#ਯੂਕਰੇਨ 
#ਨਾਟੋ 
#BayRaktar 
#ਮਿਲਟਰੀਸਿਮੂਲੇਟਰ 
# eliteoperator 
ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਗੇਮ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਹੈ। 
ਲੜਾਈ ਦਾ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਅਸਲ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਖਰਾ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। 
ਅਸੀਂ ਖਬਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਿਖਾਈ ਦੇਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਲੇਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਨਕਲ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ। 
ਆਰਮਾ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ। 

"ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਬੋਹੇਮੀਆ ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਏ.ਐੱਸ. ਦੀ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ ਦੀ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਰਕੇ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਸੀ।" 

"ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ © 2013 ਬੋਹੇਮੀਆ ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ a.s. ਸਾਰੇ ਅਧਿਕਾਰ ਰਾਖਵੇਂ ਹਨ।"

kn.title: 13 ನಿಮಿಷಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ, 12,000 ಟನ್ ಇಂಧನವನ್ನು ಸಾಗಿಸುವ 2 ಯುಎಸ್ ಸರಕು ಹಡಗುಗಳು ರಷ್ಯಾದ ಯಾಕ್ -141 ಗಳಿಂದ ನಾಶವಾದವು.
kn.description:
13 ನಿಮಿಷಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ, 12,000 ಟನ್ ಇಂಧನವನ್ನು ಸಾಗಿಸುವ 2 ಯುಎಸ್ ಸರಕು ಹಡಗುಗಳು ರಷ್ಯಾದ ಯಾಕ್ -141 ಗಳಿಂದ ನಾಶವಾದವು. 



#ಶಸ್ತ್ರ 3 
#ಮಿಲ್ಸಿಮ್ 
#ಆಟ 
#ಉಕ್ರೇನಿವ್ಸ್ ರಷ್ಯಾ 
#ರಷ್ಯಾ 
#ಉಕ್ರೇನ್ 
#ನ್ಯಾಟೋ 
#ಬೇ ರಕ್ತರ್ 
#ಮಿಲಿಟರಿ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಟರ್ 
#ಎಲೈಟ್ ಆಪರೇಟರ್ 
ಈ ವೀಡಿಯೊ ವರ್ಚುವಲ್ ಗೇಮ್ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್ ಆಗಿದೆ. 
ಯುದ್ಧ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್ ನಿಜವಾದ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್‌ಗಿಂತ ಭಿನ್ನವಾಗಿರಬಹುದು.

sa.description:
१३ निमेषपूर्वं १२,००० टन इन्धनं वहन्तः २ अमेरिकी मालवाहकजहाजाः रूसीयाक्-१४१ विमानैः नष्टाः अभवन् । 



# बाहु 3 
# मिलसिम् 
# गेमप्ले 
# यूक्रेनीव्सरूस 
# रूस 
# युक्रेन 
# नाटो 
# बायरक्तर 
# सैन्य अनुकरणकर्ता 
# अभिजात संचालक 
इदं विडियो वर्चुअल् गेम सिमुलेशन अस्ति। 
युद्ध-अनुकरणं वास्तविक-अनुकरणात् भिन्नं भवितुम् अर्हति । 
वयं वार्तासु दृश्यमानानां लेखानाम् अनुकरणं कृतवन्तः। 
ARMA गेमप्ले विडियो। 

"एतत् विडियो Bohemia Interactive a.s." 

"प्रतिलिपिधर्मः © 2013 Bohemia Interactive a.s. सर्वाधिकारः सुरक्षितः।"

Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by: Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

snippet.title: #RĀKĀSĀ Teaser | Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika | Manasa Sharma | Niharika Konidela | Zee Studios
snippet.description:
Watch the official #RaakaasaaTeaser now! A fantasy-comedy starring Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika. #Rākāsā In Cinemas April 3, 2026 💥
…………………………………………………………
Rakasa (formerly #PEP2) is a fantasy-comedy film from Pink Elephant Pictures, produced by Niharika Konidela and Zee Studios, directed by Manasa Sharma. Blending imaginative fantasy with engaging humour for audiences of all ages.

Featuring a fresh and exciting pairing of Sangeeth Shobhan and Nayan Sarika in the lead roles, Vennela Kishore, Brahmaji, Tanikella Bharani, Ashish Vidyarthi, Getup Srinu, Sukhwinder Singh, Anoop Singh, Vasu Inturi, Rohini, Rohan Roy.

Film Credits:
A Niharika Konidela Production 
Banner: Pink Elephant Pictures & Zee Studios
Producers: Niharika Konidela & Umesh Kumar Bansal
Written & Directed By: Manasa Sharma 
DOP: Edurolu Raju
Music: Anudeep Dev
Editor: Anwar Ali
Executive Producer: Ramesh Manyam
Additional Screenplay: Mahesh Uppala
Production Designer: Ramanjaneyulu 
VFX Supervisor: Murali Manohar Reddy
Art Director: Vishnu Vardhan Pulla
Costume Designer: Sandhya Sabbavarapu 
Lyricist: Raghuram, Simhachalam Mannela, Kittu Vissapragada
Co-Director: Murali Krishna Katta
Sound Effects: Raghunath Kamisetty
DI: Prasad Labs
Colorist: Surya Prakash
Makeup Chief: P Ravi Kumar
Costume Chief: R Bhupal Rao
Production Controller: Rawindar Bekkam
Stills & Making: Varahala Murthy
PRO: SK Naidu – Phani Kandukuri (Beyond Media)
Marketing: Ticket Factory

Music Slate : 
Music Arranged & Composed by : Anudeep Dev
Programmed by : Bharat Madhusudhan
Nadaswaram : Mylai Karthikeyan
Male Harmonies : Ritesh G Rao, Saatvik G Rao, Vinayak
Female Harmonies : Lakshmi Meghana, Sindhuja Srinivasan, Sai Ramya 
Mix & Mastered by: Shadab Rayeen@New Edge [Mumbai]
Remixed by : Raam Gandikota 
Manager : Sathish Eramalla
Studio Assistant : Raju Tripparapeni

Stay tuned for more updates on #Rakasa a film that promises magical laughs and a fresh take on fantasy-comedy.

Follow Us On Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/pinkelephantpictures?igsh=YXVsYWFqYTFrbGRt

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | QUARTER FINALS | Day 4
snippet.description:
The Quarter Finals of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens as qualified teams step into a stage where every match carries heavier consequences. Consistency, composure, and calculated aggression will define who moves forward.

From The Grind to Round 4, the journey has built up to this moment. Now the margin for error gets thinner.

Watch the Quarter Finals unfold and see who takes the next step toward the Finals.

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #KraftonIndiaEsports #KIE #BGMI

snippet.title: जोगी जी धीरे धीरे 🌸| Holi Special HD Song | होली गीत | Desi Holi Vibes | Sachin & Sadhana Singh
snippet.description:
Song: Jogi Ji Dheere Dheere
Movie: Nadiya Ke Paar (1982)
Singers: Chandrani Mukherjee, Hemlata, Jaspal Singh
Music: Ravindra Jain
Lyrics: Ravindra Jain
Cast: Sachin, Sadhana Singh
Director: Govind Moonis

Lyrics 👇
जोगीजी धीरे-धीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
नदी के तीरे-तीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी कोई ढूँढे मूँगा कोई ढूँढे मोतिया
हम ढूँढे अपनी जोगनिया को
जोगीजी ढूँढ के लादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिला दो हमें मिलादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

फागुन आयो ओ मस्ती लायो
भरके मारे पिचकारी सारा रा रा रा रा
रंग लेके ओ जंग लेके
मारे जोगी रातें जागी सारी आरारा रा रा रा
जोगीरा आ र र रा रा, जोगीरा आ र र रा रा

जोगीजी नींद ना आवे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
सजन की याद सतावे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगीजी प्रेम का रोग लगा हमको
कोई इसकी दवा यदि हो तो कहो

बुरी है ये बीमारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
लगे है दुनिया खारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

सारे गाँव की गोरियाँ रंग गई हमपे डार
पर जिसके रंग हम रंगे छुप गई वो गुलनार
छुप गईं वो गुलनार जोगीजी सूना है सँसार
छुप गईं वो गुलनार जोगीजी सूना है सँसार

बिना उसे रंग लगाए, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
ये फागुन लौट ना जाए, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी कोई ढूँढे मूँगा, कोई ढूँढे मोतिया
हम ढूँढे अपनी जोगनिया को
जोगीजी ढूँढ के लादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिला दो हमें मिलादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

छुपती डोले राधिका ढूँढ सके घनश्याम
कान्हा बोले लाज का, आज के दिन क्या काम
लाज का है क्या काम के होली खेले सारा गाँव
लाज का है क्या काम के होली खेले सारा गाँव

तनी है कब से राधा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिलन में फिर क्यों बाधा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी प्रेम का रोग लगा हमको
कोई इसकी दवा यदि हो तो कहो

बुरी है ये बीमारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
लगे है दुनिया खारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

हमरी जोगन का पता, उसके गहरे नैन
नैनन से घायल करे, बैनन से बेचैन
देखन को वो नैन जोगीजी, मनवा है बेचैन
देखन को वो नैन जोगीजी, मनवा है बेचैन

लड़कपन जाने को है, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जवानी आने को है, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगीजी कोई ढूँढे मूँगा, कोई ढूँढे मोतिया
हम ढूँढे अपनी जोगनिया को

जो तेरा प्रेम है सच्चा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगनिया मिलेगी बच्चा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जंतर मंतर टोटका, भस्मियाँ ताबीज
पी को बस में कर सके देदो ऐसी चीज़
देदो ऐसी चीज़ जोगीजी, साजन जाए रीझ
देदो ऐसी चीज़ जोगीजी, साजन जाए रीझ

हमारे पीछे-पीछे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
चले वो आखें मीचे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी प्रेम का रोग लगा हमको
कोई इसकी दवा जदि हो तो कहो
बुरी है ये बीमारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
लगे है दुनिया खारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी..

जोगीजी धीरे-धीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
नदी के तीरे-तीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगीजी ढूंढ के ला दो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिला दो हमें मिला दो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जो तेरा प्रेम है सच्चा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगनियां मिलेगी बच्चा, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजीपोर्टेबल स्पीक

snippet.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
snippet.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society’s judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.
It questions justice, morality, and truth in modern times.
Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today’s society, where every choice has consequences.

pt-BR.description:
Trailer de *iMRAVii* - Ravi, um homem comum envolvido em situações extraordinárias.
A história explora a complexa relação entre Ravi, a polícia e o público em geral.
Cada episódio reflete as lutas silenciosas enfrentadas por pessoas comuns em um sistema repleto de poder e pressão. Ravi se torna a voz daqueles que são frequentemente ignorados e incompreendidos.
A polícia é mostrada não apenas como autoridade, mas como seres humanos lutando contra seus próprios conflitos.
O julgamento, o medo e a esperança da sociedade moldam cada ponto de virada na narrativa.
A série mescla realismo com narrativa emocional.
Questiona a justiça, a moralidade e a verdade nos tempos modernos.
Atuações intensas e momentos emocionantes mantêm o público engajado.
*iMRAVii* é um espelho da sociedade atual, onde cada escolha tem consequências.

ja.title: iMRAVii テルグ語トレーラー ||ドラア サイ テジャー ||シュリ・ヴァニ ||キラン・マチャ ||テイジクリエイティブワークス
ja.description:
iMRAVii 予告編 - 非日常に巻き込まれた平凡な男、ラヴィ。
物語は、ラヴィ、警察、そして一般市民の複雑な関係性を描いています。
各エピソードは、権力と圧力に満ちたシステムの中で、日々の人々が直面する静かな闘いを映し出します。ラヴィは、しばしば無視され、誤解される人々の声となります。
警察は単なる権威としてではなく、自らの葛藤と闘う人間として描かれています。
社会の判断、恐怖、そして希望が、物語のあらゆる転換点を形作ります。
このシリーズは、リアリズムと感情的なストーリーテリングを融合させています。
現代社会における正義、道徳、そして真実を問いかけます。
生々しい演技と心を掴む瞬間が、観客を魅了し続けます。
*iMRAVii* は、あらゆる選択が結果をもたらす現代社会を映し出す鏡です。

kn.title: iMRAVii Kannada Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
kn.description:
"iMRAVii Kannada Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society’s judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.
It questions justice, morality, and truth in modern times.
Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today’s society, where every choice has consequences.

de-DE.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
de-DE.description:
iMRAVii Trailer – Ravi, ein ganz normaler Mann, gerät in außergewöhnliche Situationen. Die Geschichte beleuchtet die komplexe Beziehung zwischen Ravi, der Polizei und der Öffentlichkeit. Jede Folge spiegelt den stillen Kampf wider, den Menschen im Alltag in einem System voller Macht und Druck ausfechten. Ravi wird zur Stimme derer, die oft ignoriert und missverstanden werden. Die Polizei wird nicht nur als Autorität dargestellt, sondern auch als Mensch, der mit seinen eigenen Konflikten ringt. Gesellschaftliche Urteile, Ängste und Hoffnungen prägen jeden Wendepunkt der Handlung. Die Serie verbindet Realismus mit emotionalem Storytelling. Sie hinterfragt Gerechtigkeit, Moral und Wahrheit in der heutigen Zeit. Authentische Darbietungen und packende Momente fesseln die Zuschauer. *iMRAVii* ist ein Spiegelbild der heutigen Gesellschaft, in der jede Entscheidung Konsequenzen hat.

pl.title: iMRAVii telugu zwiastun || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Twórczość Dzieła
pl.description:
Zwiastun iMRAVii – Ravi, zwykły człowiek uwikłany w niezwykłe sytuacje.
Historia zgłębia złożoną relację między Ravim, policją i zwykłymi ludźmi.
Każdy odcinek odzwierciedla ciche zmagania zwykłych ludzi w systemie pełnym władzy i presji. Ravi staje się głosem tych, którzy są często ignorowani i niezrozumiani.
Policjanci są ukazani nie tylko jako autorytety, ale jako ludzie zmagający się z własnymi konfliktami.
Społeczny osąd, strach i nadzieja kształtują każdy punkt zwrotny w narracji.
Serial łączy realizm z emocjonalną narracją.
Kwestionuje sprawiedliwość, moralność i prawdę we współczesnych czasach.
Surowe kreacje aktorskie i wciągające momenty utrzymują zaangażowanie widzów.

*iMRAVii* to zwierciadło dzisiejszego społeczeństwa, w którym każdy wybór niesie ze sobą konsekwencje.

iw.title: iMRAVii Telugu טריילר || Doraa Sai Tejaa || סרי ואני || קירן מאצ'ה || Tej Creative Works
iw.description:
"טריילר של iMRAVii - ראווי, אדם רגיל שנקלע למצבים יוצאי דופן.
הסיפור בוחן את מערכת היחסים המורכבת בין ראווי, המשטרה והציבור הרחב.
כל פרק משקף את המאבקים השקטים שעמם מתמודדים אנשים רגילים במערכת מלאת כוח ולחץ. ראווי הופך לקול עבור אלו שלעתים קרובות מתעלמים מהם ולא מבינים אותם.
המשטרה מוצגת לא רק כסמכות, אלא כבני אדם הנאבקים בקונפליקטים שלהם.
שיפוט החברה, הפחד והתקווה שלה מעצבים כל נקודת מפנה בנרטיב.
הסדרה משלבת ריאליזם עם סיפור סיפורים רגשי.
היא מטילה ספק בצדק, מוסר ואמת בעידן המודרני.
הופעות גולמיות ורגעים מרתקים שומרים על הקהל מרותק.
*iMRAVii* הוא מראה לחברה של ימינו, שבה לכל בחירה יש השלכות.

it.title: Trailer di iMRAVii Telugu || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Lavori Creativi
it.description:
Trailer di iMRAVii - Ravi, un uomo comune coinvolto in situazioni straordinarie.
La storia esplora la complessa relazione tra Ravi, la polizia e la gente comune.
Ogni episodio riflette le lotte silenziose affrontate dalle persone comuni in un sistema pieno di potere e pressione. Ravi diventa la voce di coloro che vengono spesso ignorati e incompresi.
La polizia non viene mostrata solo come autorità, ma come esseri umani che combattono i propri conflitti.
Il giudizio, la paura e la speranza della società plasmano ogni punto di svolta della narrazione.
La serie fonde realismo e narrazione emotiva.
Mette in discussione giustizia, moralità e verità nei tempi moderni.
Interpretazioni crude e momenti avvincenti mantengono il pubblico coinvolto.
*iMRAVii* è uno specchio della società odierna, dove ogni scelta ha delle conseguenze.

ko.title: iMRAVIi 텔루구어 예고편 || 도라 사이 테자 || 스리 바니 || 키란 마하 || 테지 크리에이티브 웍스
ko.description:
"iMRAVii 예고편 - 평범한 남자 라비가 특별한 상황에 휘말리다.
이 이야기는 라비, 경찰, 그리고 일반 시민 사이의 복잡한 관계를 탐구합니다.
각 에피소드는 권력과 압력으로 가득 찬 시스템 속에서 평범한 사람들이 겪는 조용한 투쟁을 반영합니다. 라비는 종종 무시당하고 오해받는 사람들을 위한 목소리가 됩니다.
경찰은 단순한 권위자가 아니라, 내면의 갈등과 싸우는 인간으로 그려집니다.
사회의 판단, 두려움, 그리고 희망이 이야기의 모든 전환점을 형성합니다.
이 시리즈는 현실과 감성적인 스토리텔링을 조화롭게 결합합니다.
현대 사회의 정의, 도덕, 그리고 진실에 대한 질문을 던집니다.
진솔한 연기와 긴장감 넘치는 순간들이 시청자를 사로잡습니다.
*iMRAVii*는 모든 선택에는 결과가 따르는 오늘날 사회를 비추는 거울입니다.

nl-NL.title: iMRAVIi Telugu-trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creatieve Werken
nl-NL.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, een gewone man die in buitengewone situaties terechtkomt.
Het verhaal onderzoekt de complexe relatie tussen Ravi, de politie en het gewone publiek.
Elke aflevering weerspiegelt de stille strijd van gewone mensen in een systeem vol macht en druk. Ravi wordt een stem voor degenen die vaak genegeerd en verkeerd begrepen worden.
De politie wordt niet alleen als autoriteit getoond, maar ook als mensen die hun eigen conflicten bestrijden.
Het oordeel, de angst en de hoop van de maatschappij bepalen elk keerpunt in het verhaal.
De serie combineert realisme met emotionele verhalen.
Het stelt vragen over rechtvaardigheid, moraliteit en waarheid in de moderne tijd.
Rauwe acteerprestaties en aangrijpende momenten houden het publiek geboeid.
*iMRAVii* is een spiegel van de hedendaagse maatschappij, waar elke keuze gevolgen heeft.

en.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
en.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society’s judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.
It questions justice, morality, and truth in modern times.
Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today’s society, where every choice has consequences.

pa.title: iMRAVii ਤੇਲਗੂ ਟ੍ਰੇਲਰ || ਦੋਰਾ ਸਾਈ ਤੇਜਾ || ਸ੍ਰੀ ਵਾਣੀ || ਕਿਰਨ ਮਾਚਾ || ਤੇਜ ਕ੍ਰਿਏਟਿਵ ਵਰਕਸ
pa.description:
"iMRAVii ਟ੍ਰੇਲਰ - ਰਵੀ, ਇੱਕ ਆਮ ਆਦਮੀ ਜੋ ਅਸਾਧਾਰਨ ਸਥਿਤੀਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਫਸਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਹੈ।
ਇਹ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਰਵੀ, ਪੁਲਿਸ ਅਤੇ ਆਮ ਜਨਤਾ ਵਿਚਕਾਰ ਗੁੰਝਲਦਾਰ ਸਬੰਧਾਂ ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰਦੀ ਹੈ।
ਹਰ ਐਪੀਸੋਡ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਅਤੇ ਦਬਾਅ ਨਾਲ ਭਰੇ ਸਿਸਟਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਰੋਜ਼ਾਨਾ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਸਾਹਮਣਾ ਕੀਤੇ ਜਾਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਚੁੱਪ ਸੰਘਰਸ਼ਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਦਰਸਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ਰਵੀ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਇੱਕ ਆਵਾਜ਼ ਬਣ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਅਕਸਰ ਨਜ਼ਰਅੰਦਾਜ਼ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਅਤੇ ਗਲਤ ਸਮਝਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

ਪੁਲਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਅਧਿਕਾਰ ਵਜੋਂ ਨਹੀਂ, ਸਗੋਂ ਆਪਣੇ ਟਕਰਾਵਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਲੜ ਰਹੇ ਮਨੁੱਖਾਂ ਵਜੋਂ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਸਮਾਜ ਦਾ ਨਿਰਣਾ, ਡਰ ਅਤੇ ਉਮੀਦ ਬਿਰਤਾਂਤ ਦੇ ਹਰ ਮੋੜ ਨੂੰ ਆਕਾਰ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

ਇਹ ਲੜੀ ਭਾਵਨਾਤਮਕ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਸੁਣਾਉਣ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਯਥਾਰਥਵਾਦ ਨੂੰ ਮਿਲਾਉਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

ਇਹ ਆਧੁਨਿਕ ਸਮੇਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਿਆਂ, ਨੈਤਿਕਤਾ ਅਤੇ ਸੱਚਾਈ 'ਤੇ ਸਵਾਲ ਉਠਾਉਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

ਕੱਚੇ ਪ੍ਰਦਰਸ਼ਨ ਅਤੇ ਦਿਲਚਸਪ ਪਲ ਦਰਸ਼ਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਰੁਝੇ ਰੱਖਦੇ ਹਨ।

iMRAVii* ਅੱਜ ਦੇ ਸਮਾਜ ਦਾ ਸ਼ੀਸ਼ਾ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਚੋਣ ਦੇ ਨਤੀਜੇ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

es-US.title: Tráiler de iMRAVii Telugu || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Trabajos creativos de Tej
es-US.description:
Tráiler de iMRAVii: Ravi, un hombre común atrapado en situaciones extraordinarias.
La historia explora la compleja relación entre Ravi, la policía y la ciudadanía.
Cada episodio refleja las luchas silenciosas que enfrenta la gente común en un sistema lleno de poder y presión. Ravi se convierte en la voz de quienes a menudo son ignorados e incomprendidos.
La policía se muestra no solo como autoridad, sino como seres humanos que luchan contra sus propios conflictos.
El juicio, el miedo y la esperanza de la sociedad definen cada punto de inflexión de la narrativa.
La serie combina realismo con una narrativa emotiva.
Cuestiona la justicia, la moral y la verdad en los tiempos modernos.
Actuaciones contundentes y momentos conmovedores mantienen al público enganchado.
*iMRAVii* es un reflejo de la sociedad actual, donde cada decisión tiene consecuencias.

te.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
te.description:
"iMRAVii Telugu Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society’s judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.
It questions justice, morality, and truth in modern times.
Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today’s society, where every choice has consequences.

id.title: iMRAVii Trailer Telugu || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Karya Kreatif Tej
id.description:
Trailer iMRAVii - Ravi, seorang pria biasa yang terjebak dalam situasi luar biasa.
Kisah ini mengeksplorasi hubungan kompleks antara Ravi, polisi, dan masyarakat umum.
Setiap episode mencerminkan perjuangan diam-diam yang dihadapi oleh orang-orang biasa dalam sistem yang penuh kekuasaan dan tekanan. Ravi menjadi suara bagi mereka yang sering diabaikan dan disalahpahami.
Polisi ditampilkan bukan hanya sebagai otoritas, tetapi sebagai manusia yang berjuang melawan konflik mereka sendiri.
Penilaian, ketakutan, dan harapan masyarakat membentuk setiap titik balik dalam narasi.
Serial ini memadukan realisme dengan penceritaan emosional.
Serial ini mempertanyakan keadilan, moralitas, dan kebenaran di zaman modern.
Penampilan yang lugas dan momen-momen menegangkan membuat penonton tetap terlibat.
*iMRAVii* adalah cermin bagi masyarakat saat ini, di mana setiap pilihan memiliki konsekuensi.

uk.title: Трейлер iMRAVii телугу || Дораа Сай Теджаа || Шрі Вані || Кіран Мача || Теж Творчі роботи
uk.description:
Трейлер iMRAVii – Раві, звичайна людина, що потрапила в надзвичайні ситуації.
Історія досліджує складні стосунки між Раві, поліцією та пересічним населенням.
Кожен епізод відображає мовчазну боротьбу, з якою стикаються звичайні люди в системі, сповненій влади та тиску. Раві стає голосом тих, кого часто ігнорують та не розуміють.
Поліція показана не просто як авторитет, а як люди, які борються з власними конфліктами.
Осуд, страх та надія суспільства формують кожен поворотний момент у розповіді.
Серіал поєднує реалізм з емоційним оповіданням.
Він ставить під сумнів справедливість, мораль та правду в сучасний час.
Сирі виступи та захопливі моменти утримують увагу глядачів.
*iMRAVii* – це дзеркало сучасного суспільства, де кожен вибір має наслідки.

ru.title: Трейлер iMRAVii на телугу || Дораа Сай Теджаа || Шри Вани || Киран Мача || Тедж Творческие Работы
ru.description:
Трейлер сериала «iMRAVii» — Рави, обычный человек, оказавшийся в необычных ситуациях.
История исследует сложные взаимоотношения между Рави, полицией и обычными людьми.
Каждая серия отражает молчаливую борьбу, с которой сталкиваются обычные люди в системе, полной власти и давления. Рави становится голосом тех, кого часто игнорируют и неправильно понимают.
Полиция показана не просто как авторитет, а как люди, борющиеся со своими собственными конфликтами.
Осуждение общества, страх и надежда формируют каждый поворотный момент в повествовании.
Сериал сочетает реализм с эмоциональным повествованием.
Он ставит под сомнение справедливость, мораль и правду в современном мире.
Искренняя игра актеров и захватывающие моменты удерживают внимание зрителей.
*iMRAVii* — это зеркало современного общества, где каждый выбор имеет последствия.

bn.title: iMRAVii তেলুগু ট্রেলার || দোরা সাই তেজা || শ্রী বাণী || কিরণ মাচা || তেজ ক্রিয়েটিভ ওয়ার্কস
bn.description:
"iMRAVii ট্রেলার - রবি, অসাধারণ পরিস্থিতিতে আটকা পড়া একজন সাধারণ মানুষ।

গল্পটি রবি, পুলিশ এবং সাধারণ জনগণের মধ্যে জটিল সম্পর্ককে অন্বেষণ করে।

প্রতিটি পর্ব ক্ষমতা এবং চাপে ভরা একটি ব্যবস্থায় দৈনন্দিন মানুষের নীরব সংগ্রামকে প্রতিফলিত করে। রবি তাদের কণ্ঠস্বর হয়ে ওঠে যারা প্রায়শই উপেক্ষা করা হয় এবং ভুল বোঝাবুঝি করা হয়।

পুলিশকে কেবল কর্তৃত্ব হিসেবে নয়, বরং তাদের নিজস্ব দ্বন্দ্বের সাথে লড়াই করা মানুষ হিসেবে দেখানো হয়েছে।

সমাজের বিচার, ভয় এবং আশা গল্পের প্রতিটি মোড়কে রূপ দেয়।

ধারাবাহিকটি বাস্তববাদকে আবেগপূর্ণ গল্প বলার সাথে মিশ্রিত করে।

এটি আধুনিক সময়ে ন্যায়বিচার, নৈতিকতা এবং সত্যকে প্রশ্নবিদ্ধ করে।

কাঁচা অভিনয় এবং আকর্ষণীয় মুহূর্ত দর্শকদের ব্যস্ত রাখে।
*iMRAVii* আজকের সমাজের একটি আয়না, যেখানে প্রতিটি পছন্দেরই পরিণতি রয়েছে।

fr-FR.title: Bande-annonce Telugu iMRAVii || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Œuvres créatives de...
fr-FR.description:
Bande-annonce d'iMRAVii - Ravi, un homme ordinaire pris dans des situations extraordinaires.

L'histoire explore la relation complexe entre Ravi, la police et le citoyen lambda.

Chaque épisode reflète les luttes silencieuses que mènent les gens ordinaires au sein d'un système où règnent pouvoir et pression. Ravi devient la voix de ceux qui sont souvent ignorés et incompris.

La police est présentée non seulement comme une autorité, mais aussi comme un être humain aux prises avec ses propres conflits.

Le jugement, la peur et l'espoir de la société façonnent chaque tournant du récit.

La série mêle réalisme et narration émotionnelle.

Elle interroge la justice, la moralité et la vérité dans le monde moderne.

Des performances brutes et des moments captivants tiennent le public en haleine.

iMRAVii est un miroir de la société actuelle, où chaque choix a des conséquences.

snippet.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
snippet.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

Connect with #ScaryMovie Online:
Website: https://www.scarymovie.film
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/

localized.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
localized.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy Carvaan, visit https://www.saregama.com/carvaan/telugu
To buy virus free original tracks, visit  https://www.saregama.com/musicstore
Follow us on: YouTube: @saregamasouth
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamatelugu
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth

snippet.title: GTA V MILITARY CONVOY & FIGHTER JETS #part1
snippet.description:
This video features 100% original Grand Theft Auto V gameplay recorded and played by me in real time. All gameplay footage is captured directly from my own system and is not reused, copied, or taken from any other creator or source.
In this video, you will see authentic GTA 5 gameplay with natural progression, original playstyle, and proper in-game actions. Every scene, movement, and mission is performed by me during live gameplay recording. No third-party clips, movies, trailers, or reused content are included.
This content is created purely for gaming and entertainment purposes. The gameplay includes my own effort, recording, and basic editing to ensure originality and quality. Each video on this channel is uniquely recorded to provide viewers with a real and genuine GTA 5 experience.

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
See you on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates set sail for the legendary Grand Line, encountering wondrous new lands and fresh dangers in their quest for treasure.

Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. snippet.title: Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 | Grand Finals THE FINAL WAR | #godlike #gdr #rntx #orangutan #8bit
snippet.description:
Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thrive—both in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether we’re lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journey—to create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/welt_esports/?hl=en
website : www.weltesports.com
Discord : https://discord.gg/Bjpk3u8Cyw

ta.title: ஆண்டு 3 ரியாக்ஷன் டிரெய்லர்கள்
ta.description:
ஆடு 3 அதிகாரப்பூர்வ டிரெய்லருக்கு எதிர்வினை | ஜெயசூர்யா | மிதுன் மானுவல் தாமஸ் |விஜய் பாபு & வேணு குன்னப்பிள்ளி| விநாயகன் 

அசல் வீடியோவை இங்கே பார்க்கவும் - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DQfmKXQqVD0

snippet.title: Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi
snippet.description:
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi 

Album :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal 
Song :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal Keh Do Radha Rani Se
Singer :- Bhoomika Sharma
Lyrics :- Traditional
Music :- Mahar Studio Jaipur
Dop :- Hanni Meena

radha krishna holi song,radha krishna bhajan,holi bhajan,vrindavan me ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan me ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan holi bhajan,vrindavan ki holi,holiya me ude re gulal bhajan,shyam holi geet,kanha ji holi bhajan,kanha ji holi song,radha krishna holi bhajan 2025,radha krishna holi bhajan,krishna songs,krishna bhajan,holi ke bhajan,holi bhajan krishna,bhajan 

वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
कह दो राधा रानी से हाँ कह दो राधा रानी से….

राधा हमारी भोली भाली,
हाँ भोली भाली भोली भाली,
नटखट नन्द का लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा हमारी गोरी गोरी,
गोरी गोरी राधा गोरी गोरी,
श्याम सलोने नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के माथे पे बिंदिया सोहे,
बिंदिया सोहे हाँ बिंदिया सोहे,
मोर मुकुट नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के हाथों में चुडिया सोहे,
चुडिया सोहे हाँ चुडिया सोहे,
बंसी बजावे नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

ਪੁੱਛਗਿੱਛ ਲਈ, ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ 📩 thereactionhub181122@gmail.com 'ਤੇ ਈਮੇਲ ਕਰੋ
------------------------------------------------ਮਹੱਤਵਪੂਰਨ-------------------------------------------------
ਬੇਦਾਅਵਾ: ਅਸੀਂ ਇਹ ਚੈਨਲ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਦਾ ਮਨੋਰੰਜਨ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਆਪਣੀ ਪ੍ਰਤੀਕਿਰਿਆ, ਰਾਏ, ਵਿਚਾਰ ਅਤੇ ਵਿਚਾਰ ਸਾਂਝੇ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਹੈ।

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਬੇਦਾਅਵਾ: ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ 1976 ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ। ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਗੈਰ-ਮੁਨਾਫ਼ਾ, ਵਿਦਿਅਕ, ਜਾਂ ਨਿੱਜੀ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਦੇ ਪੱਖ ਵਿੱਚ ਸੰਤੁਲਨ ਨੂੰ ਸੁਝਾਅ ਦਿੰਦੀ ਹੈ।

ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਇਸ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਜਾਂ ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਬਚਾਅ ਬਾਰੇ ਸਾਡੀ ਸਥਿਤੀ ਬਾਰੇ ਕੋਈ ਖਾਸ ਚਿੰਤਾਵਾਂ ਹਨ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਇਸ ਬਾਰੇ ਦੋਸਤਾਨਾ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਚਰਚਾ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ thereactionhub181122@gmail.com 'ਤੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਸੰਪਰਕ ਕਰੋ। ਧੰਨਵਾਦ।

மறுப்பு: எங்கள் எதிர்வினை, கருத்து, பார்வைகள் மற்றும் எண்ணங்களைப் பகிர்ந்து கொள்வதற்காக மக்களை மகிழ்விப்பதற்காக இந்த சேனலை உருவாக்கியுள்ளோம்.

பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்பு: பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டம் 1976 இன் பிரிவு 107 இன் கீழ், விமர்சனம், கருத்து, செய்தி அறிக்கையிடல், கற்பித்தல், உதவித்தொகை மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது. இல்லையெனில் மீறக்கூடிய பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் நியாயமான பயன்பாடு அனுமதிக்கப்படுகிறது. இலாப நோக்கற்ற, கல்வி அல்லது தனிப்பட்ட பயன்பாடு நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு ஆதரவான சமநிலையைக் குறிக்கிறது.

இந்த வீடியோ அல்லது FAIR USE பாதுகாப்பு குறித்த எங்கள் நிலைப்பாடு குறித்து உங்களுக்கு ஏதேனும் குறிப்பிட்ட கவலைகள் இருந்தால், இதைப் பற்றி இணக்கமாக விவாதிக்க thereactionhub181122@gmail.com என்ற மின்னஞ்சல் முகவரியில் எங்களைத் தொடர்பு கொள்ளவும். நன்றி.

విచారణల కోసం, దయచేసి 📩 thereactionhub181122@gmail.com కు ఇమెయిల్ చేయండి
-
నిరాకరణ: మా ప్రతిచర్య, అభిప్రాయం, అభిప్రాయాలు మరియు ఆలోచనలను పంచుకోవడానికి మేము ఈ ఛానెల్‌ను సృష్టించాము, తద్వారా ప్రజలు అలరించబడతారు.

కాపీరైట్ నిరాకరణ: కాపీరైట్ చట్టం 1976లోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్య, వార్తల నివేదిక, బోధన, స్కాలర్‌షిప్ మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం" అనుమతించబడుతుంది. కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం అనుమతించబడుతుంది, అది లేకపోతే ఉల్లంఘించబడవచ్చు. లాభాపేక్షలేని, విద్యాపరమైన లేదా వ్యక్తిగత ఉపయోగం న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగానికి అనుకూలంగా సమతుల్యతను సూచిస్తుంది.

ఈ వీడియో గురించి లేదా FAIR USE రక్షణపై మా వైఖరి గురించి మీకు ఏవైనా నిర్దిష్ట సమస్యలు ఉంటే, దయచేసి దీనిని స్నేహపూర్వకంగా చర్చించడానికి thereactionhub181122@gmail.com వద్ద మమ్మల్ని సంప్రదించండి. ధన్యవాదాలు.
--

---------------------------------------------------------------- গুরুত্বপূর্ণ-------------------------------------------------
অস্বীকৃতি: আমরা এই চ্যানেলটি আমাদের প্রতিক্রিয়া, মতামত, দৃষ্টিভঙ্গি এবং চিন্তাভাবনা ভাগ করে নেওয়ার জন্য তৈরি করেছি যাতে মানুষ বিনোদন পায়।

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: ১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারার অধীনে, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়। কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের অনুমতি রয়েছে যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক, অথবা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের পরামর্শ ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য বজায় রাখার জন্য।

এই ভিডিওটি সম্পর্কে অথবা ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের প্রতিরক্ষা সম্পর্কে আমাদের অবস্থান সম্পর্কে আপনার যদি কোনও নির্দিষ্ট উদ্বেগ থাকে, তাহলে দয়া করে thereactionhub181122@gmail.com এ আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন এবং এই বিষয়ে সৌহার্দ্যপূর্ণ আলোচনা করুন। ধন্যবাদ।
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत, आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है। उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकते हैं। गैर-लाभकारी, शैक्षिक या व्यक्तिगत उपयोग निष्पक्ष उपयोग के पक्ष में संतुलन बनाता है।

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Tateeree | Badshah X Simran Jaglan X Hiten | Biggest Track Of The Year | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Where Haryana’s raw culture meets modern hip hop vibes. Desi swag and next-level energy; this one is made to rule your playlist. Biggest Party Track of the year. This track features Haryana ki Chhorri State level boxing champion Simran Jaglan ! 

Culture. Strength. Swag.
This is not just a song - it’s a vibe.

#Tateeree #haryanvisong #desihiphop  #haryana  #haryanvimusic  #newharyanvisong  

Audio Credits :
➟ Performed By Badshah & Simran Jaglan
➟ Lyrics By Badshah & Traditional
➟ Composed By Badshah & Traditional
➟ Music Produced By Hiten
➟ Mixed & Mastered By Hiten

Special Thanks - Foji Karambir 

SPECIAL THANKS TO THE PEOPLE OF HARYANA

Video Credits:
A film by  - B2gether pros
➟ Directors: Mahi Sandhu, Joban Sandhu
➟ Co-Director: Sharan Sandhu
➟ Associate Director: Ad Sing
➟ Assistant Director: Arsh
➟ Executive Producer: Arman Dhillon
➟ Editor And CG : MR. editor 
➟ Line Producer: Karann Film Production
➟ Production Assistants: Sachin Sharma, Arsh
➟ Director of Photography (DOP): param sehambi 
➟ Drone: tanish
➟ junior Costume: Sparsh
➟Choreographer - Saurabh Prajapati
➟Team Saurabh Prajapati - Sanchari and Manish
➟Thanks to all the Dancers : Alka Sharma, Arhana,  Ishika,  Deepal , Mannasviii , Shivani

​Team Badshah
➟ Hair: Javed Sheikh
➟ Makeup: Swapnil Haldankar 
➟ Security: Mohit Hooda

Lyrics
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree

Aya Badshah doli chadhane
In sabki ghodi banane
Thode pagal thode sayane
Hum aye inke plans ke ghode lagane
Aye ..launde karte bakbak
Hum shatpratishat ye ladke latpat
Puri duniya me dekho karte kartab
Par ish boy delhi hai marte dum tak

Main hi Sean (carter) main hi (lil) wayne
Main hi scene main hi game
Mere khoon me hai jeet dekh pass aake pain
Kalakar ka hai brain
 RR ki hai train
Audemars ka hai time Bulgari ki chain
Insan insane
Mera kaam insane
Do hi dost hai mere
mera pen mera pain 
meri bandi cocaine
mere gaane propane
mere sar pe hai crown mere mun pe hai fame

Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Kulture King
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Array chora apni aai pe aaya hoya hai
Do das kos se game pe chhaya hoya hai
In gamron ka game bajaya hoya hai
Jo mangvaya hoya hai woh sab laya hoya hai

Yeah… Bin gaano ke challi tu bhi nallah teri gang bhi nalli
Tu well connected politically
Mai well connected spiritually
Main stream commercial mein lyrically
Abhi underrated mai criminally
Inki dal nahi galli inki g***e jalli iss sal puri kar dunga tasalli main

Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Kulture King
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree
Ghuti kyun Ghuti kyun kare tateeree
Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree

राधा हमारी भोली भाली,
हाँ भोली भाली भोली भाली,

मोर मुकुट नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,

snippet.description:
Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma,  Aman Jaji, Ajay Dhankhar, Narender Jaji, Zipsi Studio, Saya Films.

Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music/Composer: Aman Jaji

#tuitionbadmashikaa  #desirecords  #haryanvi  


BLACK Moon Films Presents Tuition Badmashi Kaa penned by Ajay Dhankhar, performed by Mr. Hemant Faujdar & Miss Kiran Brar, sung by Mr. Masoom Sharma, Miss Manisha Sharma Ji, harmony by Mr. Aman Jaji, lived by Mr. Ajay Dhankhar & Mr. Narender Jaji

Starring: Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar
Supporting Actor: Arun Malik, Kiyaan Malik, Madhav Maddy
Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music: Aman Jaji
Director: Ajay Dhankhar
Art Director: Vijay Giri
Action Director: Vishal Bhargav
Assistant Director: Vivek Garg, Narender Jaji, Rohit Dhankhar
Creative Head: Narender Jaji
Camera Team A: Aakash Ganga Films
Camera Team B: Saya Films
DOP: Sunil
Edit: Zipsi Studio
VFX: Himanshu Gulia
Publicity Design: Pankaj Kumar (+91-89492-12414)
Music Streaming Poster Design: Sumit Bamal
Photography & BTS: Simran Ubhi
Production: Akash Ganga Films & Manjeet Productions
Makeup: Mithoon
Project By: Ajay Dhankhar
Promotions: Urbane Loop Media 

LYRICS: 
Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re
Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re

Re Tu Fuke Cash Aur Lerya Aish Issi Konsi Kare Funkari Re
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai

Ohh Khoon Me Pump Ya Kare Dileri Na Milte Kite Bazara Mein
Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein
Khoon Me Pump Ya Kare Dileri Na Milte Kite Bazara Mein
Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein
Re Gaat Me Jaan Ya Bhari Padi Janu Nila Ford Saan Athasi Ka

Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Kit Karna Asla Use Gori Kit Karna Use Gndasi Ka
Ohh Ankh Aag Te Laal Teri Aur Asla Hardam Sath Rhve
Entry Teri Pe Sare Haan Kyun Pache Police Tainat Rahve
Tere Pache Police Tainat Rahve

Na Mran Maran Te Darta Tu Na Ke Jung Jiten Ki Tyari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Re Choda Toh Mere Murder Case Aur Chalis Case Frari Ke
Ho Tere Yaar Ne Paade Filter Mehkme Sarkari Ke
Mehkme Sarkari Ke…

Shehri Paplu Ke Jane Re Swad Yo Desi Lassi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Kit Karna Asla Use Gori Kit Karna Use Gndasi Ka

Agee Pache Rahve Media Tu Itna Charchit Chehra Hai
Ohh Sunya Tera Itihas Mane Samunder Te Bhi Gehra Hai
Sunya Tera Itihas Mane Samunder Te Bhi Gehra Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai

Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai

Re Sher Yo Bukha Marjave ga Par Kade Ghass Na Khavega

13 ນາທີ​ກ່ອນ​ນີ້, ກຳ​ປັ່ນ​ບັນທຸກ​ສິນຄ້າ​ຂອງ​ອາ​ເມ​ລິ​ກາ 2 ລຳ ທີ່​ບັນທຸກ​ນ້ຳມັນ​ເຊື້ອ​ໄຟ 12.000 ​ໂຕນ​ຖືກ​ທຳລາຍ​ດ້ວຍ​ກຳ​ປັ່ນ YAK-141 ຂອງຣັດ​ເຊຍ.

ວິດີໂອນີ້ເປັນການຈຳລອງເກມສະເໝືອນຈິງ. 
ການຈຳລອງການຕໍ່ສູ້ອາດຈະແຕກຕ່າງຈາກການຈຳລອງຕົວຈິງ. 
ພວກເຮົາຈໍາລອງບົດຄວາມທີ່ປາກົດຢູ່ໃນຂ່າວ.

ta.description:
13 நிமிடங்களுக்கு முன்பு, 12,000 டன் எரிபொருளை ஏற்றிச் சென்ற 2 அமெரிக்க சரக்குக் கப்பல்கள் ரஷ்ய YAK-141 களால் அழிக்கப்பட்டன. 

#ஆயுதம் 3 
#மில்சிம் 
#விளையாட்டு 
#உக்ரைனிவ்ஸ் ரஷ்யா 
#ரஷ்யா 
#உக்ரைன் 
#நேட்டோ 
#பேரக்தார் 
#மிலிட்டரி சிமுலேட்டர் 
#எலைட் ஆபரேட்டர் 

இந்த வீடியோ ஒரு விர்ச்சுவல் கேம் சிமுலேஷன். 
போர் உருவகப்படுத்துதல் உண்மையான உருவகப்படுத்துதலில் இருந்து வேறுபடலாம். 
செய்திகளில் வரும் கட்டுரைகளை உருவகப்படுத்தினோம். 
ARMA கேம்ப்ளே வீடியோ. 

"இந்த வீடியோ Bohemia Interactive a.s இன் உள்ளடக்கத்தைப் பயன்படுத்தி தயாரிக்கப்பட்டது."

bn-IN.title: 13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান YAK-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয়ে
bn-IN.description:
13 মিনিট আগে, 12,000 টন জ্বালানি বহনকারী 2টি মার্কিন কার্গো জাহাজ রাশিয়ান YAK-141 দ্বারা ধ্বংস হয়েছিল 

#আরমা ৩ 
#মিলসিম 
#গেমপ্লে 
#ইউক্রেন রাশিয়া 
#রাশিয়া 
#ইউক্রেন 
#ন্যাটো 
#বেরক্তার 
#সামরিক সিমুলেটর 
# অভিজাত অপারেটর 

এই ভিডিওটি একটি ভার্চুয়াল গেম সিমুলেশন। 
যুদ্ধের সিমুলেশন প্রকৃত সিমুলেশন থেকে ভিন্ন হতে পারে। 
আমরা সংবাদে প্রদর্শিত নিবন্ধগুলি অনুকরণ করেছি। 
আরমা গেমপ্লে ভিডিও। 

"এই ভিডিওটি বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s এর সামগ্রী ব্যবহার করে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।" 

"কপিরাইট © 2013 বোহেমিয়া ইন্টারেক্টিভ a.s. সর্বস্বত্ব সংরক্ষিত।"

km.title: ១៣ នាទីមុននេះ កប៉ាល់ដឹកទំនិញអាមេរិកចំនួន ២ គ្រឿងដែលផ្ទុកប្រេង ១២,០០០ តោន ត្រូវបានបំផ្លាញដោយយន្តហោះ Y
km.description:
១៣ នាទីមុននេះ កប៉ាល់ដឹកទំនិញអាមេរិកចំនួន ២ គ្រឿងដែលផ្ទុកប្រេង ១២,០០០ តោន ត្រូវបានបំផ្លាញដោយយន្តហោះ YAK-141 របស់រុស្ស៊ី។ 

#អាម៉ា ៣ 
#មីស៊ីម 
# ការលេងហ្គេម 
#អ៊ុយក្រែន រុស្ស៊ី 
# រុស្ស៊ី 
#អ៊ុយក្រែន 
#ណាតូ 
# BayRaktar 
# អ្នកក្លែងធ្វើយោធា 
# ប្រតិបត្តិករវរជន 

វីដេអូនេះគឺជាការក្លែងធ្វើហ្គេមនិម្មិត។ 
ការក្លែងធ្វើប្រយុទ្ធអាចខុសគ្នាពីការក្លែងធ្វើជាក់ស្តែង។ 
យើងក្លែងធ្វើអត្ថបទដែលបង្ហាញក្នុងព័ត៌មាន។ 
វីដេអូលេងហ្គេម ARMA ។ 

"វីដេអូនេះត្រូវបានផលិតដោយប្រើខ្លឹមសារពី Bohemia Interactive a.s" 

"រក្សាសិទ្ធិ © 2013 Bohemia Interactive a.s. All rights reserved."

snippet.title: De Daru De Daru | Karma (1986) | Kishore Kumar, Manhar Udhas | Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Details :
Star Cast : Dilip Kumar, Nutan, Naseeruddin Shah, Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor, Anupam Kher, Sridevi, Poonam Dhillon
Singers : Kishore Kumar, Mahendra Kapoor, Manhar Udhas
Music Director :  Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyrics by: Anand Bakshi
Producer & Director: Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

De Daru, De Daru, O Mere Bhaiya De Daru
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Kyaa saagar hain kyaa minaa hain
Ye peena bhi koi peena hain
Peena hain peena hain
Peena hain to munh se lagaakar
Botal peene de daaru
De  dada o mere bhaiya re de daaru
De daaru botal se peene de daaru
Are bade dinon ke
Baad mili hain ye daaru
Are hosh rahe na
Baaki saaqi de daaru
O mere bhaiya de daaru

Ye andar baahar hone do
Hamen hansane do hamen rone do
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab kante pe tul jaa enge
Ham bure sahi par achchhe hain
Kyonki ham dil ke sachche hain
Are jooth kahen to jaan hamaari
Le daaru o mere bhaiya de daaru

One peg two peg three peg four peg
Ham peg pikar hosh mein aae hain
Haan ab ham josh mein aae hain
Paani mein aag milaai hain
Kuchh garmi khuun mein aayi hain
Masti sar chadhake bolegi
Ab gori ghuunghat kholegi
Wo haath kisi ke pade nahin
Hum bade dinon se lade nahin
Are aaj kisi ko maarenge de daaru
Are detaa jaa daaru re
O mere bhaiya de daaru.

Sonotek Music Presents "Yaha Ke Bahubali" (Official Video) a New Latest Most Popular haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2026, Haryanvi Song, New Hr Song, .New Haryanvi Song 2026, New Haryanvi Song Starring with Masoom Sharma & Amar Karnawal. This superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Masoom Sharma . Music Given By Pinna Music. lyrics of this superhit song is written by Amar Karnawal. Copyright & Music Label By "Sonotek Music"

Song - Yaha Ke Bahubali
Starring - Masoom Sharma 
Singer - Masoom Sharma
Lyics - Amar Karnawal
Music - Pinna Music
Edit /Artwork - Hitarrth Sardana(Sonotek)
Production - Team Sonotek
Project By - Yash Thukral
Digital Work - Roshan Ekma
Producer - Hansraj Railhan, Leela Krishan, Rajesh Thukral & Ankit Vij
Copyright & Label - Sonotek Music

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE 

Lyrics - 
Are gundey ha ji gunday ha 
Ya baat bhi sacchi se 
Pr fan follwing bde stara te bhi acchi se 
Sangeen maamle sir pe 
Beshak umar ya kacchi se 
Mhara baal ni paatya 
Aake mot mandere nachhi se 
Re dedya bde bdya ne jhatke
Dabbe rhe aslya k khatke 
Rakkhi tor bhi sbse hatke
Konya rob pde kam se 
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se 
Re Leader fail kafile agge 
Karfyu mhare aan te lagge 
Bairi dekh ke system bhagge
Aura aaj nhi kam se 

Hum ve sa jinki duniya agge gatha gayi jawegi
Producer Rapiye lawenge ko filam bnayi jawegi 
Re UP aale sukhla ki ju challega karnawliya 
Ar humne maran khattar nyari force bnayi jawegi 
nyari force bnayi jawegi 
Mhari ithas gvahi dega 
Chalda naam dikhai dega 
Aesi yaar tbhai dega 
Janu patya ho kite bam se 
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se 
Re Leader fail kafile agge 
Karfyu mhare aan te lagge 
Bairi dekh ke system bhagge
Aura aaj nhi kam se

Re suthre balak sher sa jigra
Ma ne suthre jame se
Fand ne fukri marniye
Ham rakha kaam te kame se
Are karnawliya amar tera yo
Heera jaan karoda me
Mahare barga ak bhi konya
Ham to madam hame se
Ham to madam hame se
Re jisme batti se do dane
Bana du lule langde kane
Thare cort kacheri thane
Chale aale bhi ham se
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se 
Re Leader fail kafile agge 
Karfyu mhare aan te lagge 
Bairi dekh ke system bhagge
Aura aaj nhi kam se

snippet.description:
Welcome to another exciting BeamNG.Drive gameplay video! In this episode, we transport Lightning McQueen using a flatbed truck through dangerous roads full of potholes. Will McQueen survive the brutal terrain? Watch to find out!

🚛 Flatbed Truck Simulation  
🚗 Pothole vs Car Physics Test  
⚡️ Lightning McQueen in BeamNG.Drive  
🔥 Realistic Car Crashes and Damage  
🎮 BeamNG.Drive Truck Transport Challenge  

This video showcases realistic crash physics, vehicle transport simulation, and thrilling challenges with a flatbed truck in BeamNG.Drive. Perfect for fans of car crashes, truck driving, and Lightning McQueen mods!

📌 Don’t forget to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more BeamNG content!

snippet.title: Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan
snippet.description:
#holi #krishnagopal #bhajan
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan #holi

#krishnagopal #bhajan #holispecial #vrindavan #krishna #radha 

radha krishna holi song,radha krishna bhajan,holi bhajan,vrindavan me ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan me ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan holi bhajan,vrindavan ki holi,holiya me ude re gulal bhajan,shyam holi geet,kanha ji holi bhajan,kanha ji holi song,radha krishna holi bhajan 2025,radha krishna holi bhajan,krishna songs,krishna bhajan,holi ke bhajan,holi bhajan krishna,bhajan 

वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
कह दो राधा रानी से हाँ कह दो राधा रानी से….

राधा हमारी भोली भाली,
हाँ भोली भाली भोली भाली,
नटखट नन्द का लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा हमारी गोरी गोरी,
गोरी गोरी राधा गोरी गोरी,
श्याम सलोने नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के माथे पे बिंदिया सोहे,
बिंदिया सोहे हाँ बिंदिया सोहे,
मोर मुकुट नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के हाथों में चुडिया सोहे,
चुडिया सोहे हाँ चुडिया सोहे,
बंसी बजावे नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………
tags: holiya mein ude re gulal remix

Speed Records presents “Tohr Aap Boldi” from the Punjabi movie Ishqa’n De Lekhe. Sung by Gurnam Bhullar and featuring Isha Malviya, this latest Punjabi song is full of swag and pure party vibes.

With catchy beats and strong Punjabi music, Tohr Aap Boldi is the perfect Punjabi party song for weddings, road trips, and weekend house party playlists. The on-screen chemistry between Gurnam Bhullar and Isha Malviya makes this music video even more fun to watch.

If you enjoy new Punjabi songs with energy, add this trending Punjabi song to your playlist now and turn up the volume. Check out the song now!

snippet.title: Dragon Duke Takes to the Skies! Clash of Clans New Hero Animation
snippet.description:
A ferocious flying Hero breaks free! Red, rebellious, and bursting with rage, Dragon Duke takes flight for Town Hall 15 villages and above!

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte - (HD) | Radha Sang Holi Nanadlal Khelate | Special Holi Song
snippet.description:
Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte - (HD) | Radha Sang Holi Nanadlal Khelate | Special Holi Song

Song - Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Masti Laayi 
Singer - Lakhbir Singh Lakkha 
Music - Surinder Kohli, Natraj, Sohal Lal, Durga

Lyrics :
Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।
Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte ,
Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte ।
Radha Sang Holi Nandlal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।।

Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।
Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Jay Ho ।।

Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।

snippet.title: Franklin Opens a Chicken Biriyani Shop for His Family 😍 GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
After tasting Shiranui’s delicious homemade chicken biriyani, Franklin gets inspired to start a chicken biriyani shop for his loved ones. With the help of Shinchan, Chop and the kids, Franklin builds a beach biriyani cart and begins a new business journey 🌊🍛

But running a small family shop is never easy…

A jealous chef gang arrives to destroy their dream 😱

Can Franklin protect his family’s happiness and save their new biriyani business?

Watch this emotional, fun and action packed GTA 5 Malayalam story till the end 🔥

This video includes:

👉 Family Love
👉 New Business Journey
👉 Funny Moments with Shinchan
👉 Emotional Story
👉 Action & Comeback

Enjoy this GTA 5 Malayalam roleplay featuring Franklin, Shiranui, Shinchan and friends ❤️

Like 👍
Share 🔁
Subscribe ❤️

snippet.title: 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After becoming the first King of the Unstable SMP, I promised to protect my people and my kingdom... and if I don't? Then I'll resign. These are my First 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP.  

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪ @wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  ‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪   @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  ‪ @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @dragon_mc_ @lezywezy @4CVIT @LettuceK 

Original Song by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

kn.title: 3 ಗಂಟೆಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ! USನ ಅತಿದೊಡ್ಡ ವಿಮಾನವಾಹಕ ನೌಕೆಯನ್ನು ರಷ್ಯಾದ MIG-39 ಫೈಟರ್ ಜೆಟ್ ಪೈಲಟ್ ನಾಶಪಡಿಸಿದನು!

3 ಗಂಟೆಗಳ ಹಿಂದೆ! USನ ಅತಿದೊಡ್ಡ ವಿಮಾನವಾಹಕ ನೌಕೆಯನ್ನು ರಷ್ಯಾದ MIG-39 ಫೈಟರ್ ಜೆಟ್ ಪೈಲಟ್ ನಾಶಪಡಿಸಿದನು! 


ಹಕ್ಕು ನಿರಾಕರಣೆ: ಈ ಚಾನಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿರುವ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವೀಡಿಯೊಗಳು Arma 3 ರ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್ ಆಟಗಳಾಗಿವೆ! ಅವು ವಾಸ್ತವವನ್ನು ಪ್ರತಿಬಿಂಬಿಸುವುದಿಲ್ಲ ಮತ್ತು ಲೇಖಕರ ಕಲ್ಪನೆಯ ಉತ್ಪನ್ನವಾಗಿದೆ! ಈ ಚಾನಲ್ ಪ್ರಚಾರದ ಉದ್ದೇಶಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಅಲ್ಲ! ಚಾನೆಲ್ ಬರಹಗಾರರು ಪೂರ್ಣ ಹೃದಯದಿಂದ ಯುದ್ಧವನ್ನು ವಿರೋಧಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ ಮತ್ತು ಶಾಂತಿಯುತವಾಗಿ ಸಹಬಾಳ್ವೆ ನಡೆಸಲು ಎಲ್ಲರಿಗೂ ಕರೆ ನೀಡುತ್ತಾರೆ! 

𝐖ಗುಲುಂಗ್𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭? 
👍 ವೀಡಿಯೊ ಇಷ್ಟವಾಯಿತು! 
💬 ಕಾಮೆಂಟ್‌ಗಳು. 
🔗 ಅವರು ಇಷ್ಟಪಡಬಹುದು ಎಂದು ನೀವು ಭಾವಿಸುವ ಯಾರೊಂದಿಗಾದರೂ ವೀಡಿಯೊಗಳನ್ನು ಹಂಚಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. 
🔴ಇನ್ನಷ್ಟು ಚಂದಾದಾರರಾಗಿ!

ከ 3 ሰዓታት በፊት! ትልቁ የአሜሪካ አውሮፕላን ተሸካሚ በሩሲያ ኤምጂ-39 ተዋጊ ጄት አብራሪ ወድሟል! 


ማስተባበያ፡ በዚህ ቻናል ላይ ያሉት ሁሉም ቪዲዮዎች የአርማ 3 የማስመሰል ጨዋታዎች ናቸው። እውነታውን የማያንፀባርቁ እና የጸሐፊው ምናብ ውጤቶች ናቸው! ይህ ቻናል ለፕሮፓጋንዳ ዓላማ አይደለም! የቻናሉ ጸሃፊው ከልቡ ጦርነትን በመቃወም ሁሉም ሰው በሰላም አብሮ እንዲኖር ጥሪ ያደርጋል!

pa.title: 3 ਘੰਟੇ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ! ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡੇ ਯੂਐਸ ਏਅਰਕ੍ਰਾਫਟ ਕੈਰੀਅਰ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਰੂਸੀ MIG-39 ਲੜਾਕੂ ਜੈੱਟ ਪਾਇਲਟ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਤਬਾਹ ਕਰ
pa.description:
3 ਘੰਟੇ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ! ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡੇ ਯੂਐਸ ਏਅਰਕ੍ਰਾਫਟ ਕੈਰੀਅਰ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਰੂਸੀ MIG-39 ਲੜਾਕੂ ਜੈੱਟ ਪਾਇਲਟ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਤਬਾਹ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਸੀ! 


ਬੇਦਾਅਵਾ: ਇਸ ਚੈਨਲ ਦੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਅਰਮਾ 3 ਦੀਆਂ ਸਿਮੂਲੇਸ਼ਨ ਗੇਮਾਂ ਹਨ! ਉਹ ਅਸਲੀਅਤ ਨੂੰ ਨਹੀਂ ਦਰਸਾਉਂਦੇ ਅਤੇ ਲੇਖਕ ਦੀ ਕਲਪਨਾ ਦਾ ਉਤਪਾਦ ਹਨ! ਇਹ ਚੈਨਲ ਪ੍ਰਚਾਰ ਦੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ! ਚੈਨਲ ਦਾ ਲੇਖਕ ਪੂਰੇ ਦਿਲ ਨਾਲ ਜੰਗ ਦਾ ਵਿਰੋਧ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ ਅਤੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਸ਼ਾਂਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਇਕੱਠੇ ਰਹਿਣ ਲਈ ਕਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ! 

𝐖ਗੁਲੁੰਗ𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭? 
👍 ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਕੀਤਾ! 
💬 ਟਿੱਪਣੀਆਂ। 
🔗 ਕਿਸੇ ਵੀ ਵਿਅਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸੋਚਦੇ ਹੋ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਪਸੰਦ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। 
🔴ਹੋਰ ਲਈ ਗਾਹਕ ਬਣੋ!

ሓላፍነት ምውሳድ: ኩሎም ኣብዚ ቻነል ዝቐርቡ ቪድዮታት ናይ ኣርማ 3 ናይ ምምሳል ጸወታታት እዮም! ንክውንነት ዘንጸባርቑን ውጽኢት ምናኔ ደራስን እዮም! እዛ ቻነል ንፕሮፖጋንዳ ኣይኮነትን! ጸሓፊ ቻነል ብሙሉእ ልቡ ንኲናት ብምቅዋም ኩሉ ሰብ ብሰላም ሓቢሩ ክነብር ይጽውዕ!

snippet.title: ROBLOX WOULD YOU RATHER, But It ACTUALLY HAPPENS..
snippet.description:
Today i played roblox would you rather but it actually happens. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

pa.title: ਰਾਏਸਟਾਰ ਅਤੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਸੜਕਾਂ 'ਤੇ 40 ਲੱਖ ਰੁਪਏ ਵੰਡੇ ਗਏ 😱🔥 | MOBA ਗੋਲਡਨ ਮਹੀਨਾ
pa.description:
🚨 ਭਾਰੀ ਨਕਦੀ ਦਾ ਤੋਹਫ਼ਾ! ਗਿਆਨ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਅਤੇ ਰਾਏਸਟਾਰ ਗਾਹਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਹੈਰਾਨ ਕਰ ਦੇਣ ਵਾਲੇ! 🎁

ਸਾਲ ਦਾ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡਾ ਗਿਵਵੇਅ ਪ੍ਰੋਗਰਾਮ! ਗਿਆਨ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਅਤੇ ਰਾਏਸਟਾਰ ਨੇ ਖੁਸ਼ਕਿਸਮਤ ਗਾਹਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਹਰੇਕ ਨੂੰ 20 ਲੱਖ ਦਾ ਵੱਡਾ ਗਿਵਵੇਅ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਨੂੰ ਵਾਪਸ ਦਿੱਤਾ! 😱💸

ਇਹ ਕਿਉਂ ਹੋ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ? ਕਿਉਂਕਿ ਇਹ ਅਧਿਕਾਰਤ ਤੌਰ 'ਤੇ MOBA 5v5 ਗੋਲਡਨ ਮਹੀਨਾ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਜਸ਼ਨ ਚਾਰਟ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਹਰ ਹਨ!

🎮 ਖੇਡੋ ਅਤੇ ਵੱਡੇ ਇਨਾਮ ਜਿੱਤੋ!

ਇਨਾਮ ਨਕਦ ਗਿਵਵੇਅ 'ਤੇ ਨਹੀਂ ਰੁਕਦੇ। ਗੋਲਡਨ ਮਹੀਨਾ ਮਨਾਉਣ ਲਈ, ਇਸ ਸਮੇਂ ਇੱਕ ਪਾਗਲ ਇਨ-ਗੇਮ ਪ੍ਰੋਗਰਾਮ ਹੋ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ:

MOBA ਗੇਮ ਦੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਸਿੱਧੇ 10,000 ਸਮਾਰਟਫੋਨ ਦਿੱਤੇ ਜਾ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ! 📱🔥

📲 ਹੁਣੇ MOBA 5v5 ਡਾਊਨਲੋਡ ਕਰੋ:

ਵੱਡੀ ਜਿੱਤ ਦਾ ਮੌਕਾ ਨਾ ਗੁਆਓ। ਪਲੇ ਸਟੋਰ 'ਤੇ ਜਾਓ, MOBA 5v5 ਡਾਊਨਲੋਡ ਕਰੋ, ਅਤੇ ਅੱਜ ਹੀ ਐਕਸ਼ਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਛਾਲ ਮਾਰੋ!

👉 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mobiin.gp&pcampaignid=web_share

ਗਿਆਨ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਅਤੇ ਰਾਏਸਟਾਰ ਤੋਂ ਆਪਣੇ ਇਨਾਮ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹੋ, ਇਹ ਜਾਣਨ ਲਈ ਪੂਰੀ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਦੇਖਣਾ ਯਕੀਨੀ ਬਣਾਓ।

👍 ਲਾਈਕ ਕਰਨਾ, ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰਨਾ ਅਤੇ ਬੈੱਲ ਆਈਕਨ ਨੂੰ ਦਬਾਉਣਾ ਨਾ ਭੁੱਲੋ ਤਾਂ ਜੋ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕਦੇ ਵੀ ਕੋਈ ਅਪਡੇਟ ਨਾ ਗੁਆਓ! ਸਾਨੂੰ ਟਿੱਪਣੀਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦੱਸੋ ਕਿ ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਜਿੱਤ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹੋ ਤਾਂ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕੀ ਕਰੋਗੇ!

ko.description:
🚨 엄청난 현금 증정 이벤트! Gyan Gaming과 Raistar가 구독자 여러분께 깜짝 선물을 드립니다! 🎁

이 이벤트가 진행되는 이유는 바로 MOBA 5v5 골든 먼스(Golden Month)를 기념하기 위해서입니다!

현금 증정 이벤트뿐만 아니라, 골든 먼스를 기념하는 특별 게임 내 이벤트도 진행 중입니다.

MOBA 게임 내에서 1만 대의 스마트폰을 증정합니다! 📱🔥

놓치지 마세요. 지금 바로 플레이 스토어에서 MOBA 5v5를 다운로드하고 게임에 참여하세요!

Gyan Gaming과 Raistar에서 제공하는 보상을 받는 방법을 알아보려면 전체 영상을 시청하세요!

👍 좋아요, 구독, 그리고 알림 벨 아이콘을 눌러 업데이트를 놓치지 마세요! 당첨된다면 무엇을 하고 싶은지 댓글로 알려주세요!

ar.title: توزيع 40 لاخ روبية في الشوارع من قبل رايستار وجيان غيمنغ 😱🔥 | الشهر الذهبي لألعاب موبا
ar.description:
🚨 مسابقة نقدية ضخمة! جيان غيمنغ ورايستار يفاجئان المشتركين! 🎁
أكبر مسابقة جوائز لهذا العام! قدمت جيان غيمنغ ورايستار هدية رائعة لمجتمعنا المميز، عبارة عن 20 لاخ لكل منهما لمشتركين محظوظين! 😱💸

لماذا يحدث هذا؟ لأنه الشهر الذهبي للعبة MOBA 5v5، والاحتفالات في أوجها!

🎮 العب واربح جوائز ضخمة!

لا تتوقف المكافآت عند الجوائز النقدية. احتفالاً بالشهر الذهبي، هناك فعالية مذهلة داخل اللعبة الآن:
